name: Encryption Request
desc: Requests the client to enable encryption by sending the server ID, RSA public key, and a verify token.

fields.name: verifyToken
fields.desc: Random bytes the client must encrypt and return

notes: Client generates a shared secret, encrypts it + verify token with the server's public key, then sends them back in C01PacketEncryptionResponse.

implementation.overview: Requests encryption with server ID, public key, verify token. Modules: CrackedBypass (cancel), SessionStealer.
